name: Mikes S/s Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Kidney beans, washed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer the green beans, wax beans, and kidney beans in a glass bowl.
2. Place thinly sliced Bermuda or white onion slices between each layer of beans.
3. Blend all ingredients for the sauce on medium until thick.
4. Cover the beans with the sauce and refrigerate for best results before serving.
5. Enjoy.
